words.definition: To achieve or complete something successfully.
words.exampleSentence: We can accomplish anything if we work together.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ສຳເລັດ (het hai sam-led)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำสำเร็จ (tham sam-ret)

words.definition: Kind, helpful, and generous.
words.exampleSentence: The benevolent businessman donated millions to the orphanage.
words.laoTranslation: ມີເມດຕາ (mi med-ta)
words.thaiTranslation: เมตตา (met-ta)

words.definition: To work together with someone else in order to achieve something.
words.exampleSentence: The two companies agreed to cooperate on the new project.
words.laoTranslation: ຮ່ວມມື (ruam mue)
words.thaiTranslation: ร่วมมือ (ruam mue)

words.definition: The ability to understand and share the feelings of another.
words.exampleSentence: Having empathy allows you to connect deeper with people.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມເຫັນອົກເຫັນໃຈ (khuam hen ok hen chai)
words.thaiTranslation: ความเห็นอกเห็นใจ (khwam hen ok hen chai)

words.definition: To change continually; shift back and forth uncertainly.
words.exampleSentence: The prices of vegetables fluctuate depending on the season.
words.laoTranslation: ຜັນຜວນ (phan phuan)
words.thaiTranslation: ผันผวน (phan phuan)

words.definition: Real, authentic, and not fake.
words.exampleSentence: This jacket is made of genuine leather.
words.laoTranslation: ແທ້ (tae)
words.thaiTranslation: แท้ (thae)

words.definition: An idea or explanation that you test through study and experimentation.
words.exampleSentence: The scientist formed a hypothesis to explain the results of the experiment.
words.laoTranslation: ສົມມຸດຕິຖານ (som-mud-ti-than)
words.thaiTranslation: สมมติฐาน (som-mut-ti-than)

words.definition: Certain to happen and unable to be avoided.
words.exampleSentence: With so much traffic, delays are inevitable.
words.laoTranslation: ຫຼີກລ່ຽງບໍ່ໄດ້ (lik liang bor dai)
words.thaiTranslation: หลีกเลี่ยงไม่ได้ (lik liang mai dai)

words.definition: To show or prove to be right or reasonable.
words.exampleSentence: You need to justify why you spent so much money.
words.laoTranslation: ໃຫ້ເຫດຜົນ (hai hed phon)
words.thaiTranslation: ให้เหตุผล (hai het phon)

words.definition: To cause or enable a condition or state to continue.
words.exampleSentence: It is important to maintain a healthy diet and lifestyle.
words.laoTranslation: ຮັກສາ (hak sa)
words.thaiTranslation: รักษา (rak sa)

words.definition: New, original, and not like anything seen before.
words.exampleSentence: She suggested a novel approach to solving the problem.
words.laoTranslation: ໃໝ່ໆ/ແປກໃໝ່ (mai mai / paek mai)
words.thaiTranslation: แปลกใหม่ (plaek mai)

words.definition: Easy to see or understand.
words.exampleSentence: It was obvious that she was unhappy with the results.
words.laoTranslation: ຈະແຈ້ງ / ຊັດເຈນ (cha chaeng / sad chen)
words.thaiTranslation: ชัดเจน (chat chen)

words.definition: To convince someone to do or believe something.
words.exampleSentence: He managed to persuade his parents to let him go on the trip.
words.laoTranslation: ຊັກຊວນ / ໂນ້ມນ້າວ (sak xuan / nom naw)
words.thaiTranslation: โน้มน้าว (nom nao)

words.definition: A person or a thing that seems to belong to the past and not to fit in the present.
words.exampleSentence: Using a typewriter in a modern office is considered an anachronism.
words.laoTranslation: ສິ່ງທີ່ຜິດຍຸກຜິດສະໄໝ (sing thi phid yuk phid sa-mai)
words.thaiTranslation: สิ่งที่ผิดยุคผิดสมัย (sing thi phit yuk phit sa-mai)

words.definition: Changing mood or behavior suddenly and unexpectedly.
words.exampleSentence: The administration's capricious policies left businesses confused.
words.laoTranslation: ໂລເລ / ປ່ຽນແປງງ່າຍ (lo le / piang paeng ngai)
words.thaiTranslation: แปรปรวนง่าย / โลเล (prae pruan ngai / lo le)

words.definition: To deliberately make something unclear or difficult to understand.
words.exampleSentence: The politician tried to obfuscate the truth with long speeches.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ສັບສົນ / ບັງຕາ (het hai sab-son / bang ta)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้สับสน / คลุมเครือ (tham hai sap-son / khlum-khruea)

words.definition: To examine something very carefully in order to discover information.
words.exampleSentence: Customers were encouraged to scrutinize the contract before signing.
words.laoTranslation: ກວດກາຢ່າງລະອຽດ (kuat ka yang la-iad)
words.thaiTranslation: ตรวจสอบอย่างละเอียด (truat sop yang la-iat)

words.definition: To try serious or hard to do something.
words.exampleSentence: You must make an effort to arrive on time.
words.laoTranslation: ພະຍາຍາມ (pha-nya-nyam)
words.thaiTranslation: พยายาม (pha-ya-yam)

words.definition: To accept the duty to take care of something or accept the blame.
words.exampleSentence: As the manager, she decided to take responsibility for the error.
words.laoTranslation: ຮັບຜິດຊອບ (hab phid xob)
words.thaiTranslation: รับผิดชอบ (rap phit chop)

words.definition: Feeling a strong emotion, especially sadness or sympathy.
words.exampleSentence: Everyone was deeply moved by his touching speech.
words.laoTranslation: ປະທັບໃຈຢ່າງເລິກເຊິ່ງ (pa-thab chai yang lek seng)
words.thaiTranslation: ซาบซึ้งใจอย่างลึกซึ้ง (sap-sueng chai yang luek-sueng)

words.definition: To stop doing something that you do regularly.
words.exampleSentence: It is hard to break a habit of biting your nails.
words.laoTranslation: ເຊົາເຮັດຈົນເປັນນິໄສ (xao het chon pen ni-sai)
words.thaiTranslation: เลิกนิสัย (loek ni-sai)

words.definition: To attract someone's attention.
words.exampleSentence: The beautiful dress in the window caught her eye.
words.laoTranslation: ດຶງດູດຄວາມສົນໃຈ (dueng dud khuam son chai)
words.thaiTranslation: ดึงดูดสายตา / เตะตา (dueng-dut sai-ta / te ta)

words.definition: To get more knowledge or skill from doing a job.
words.exampleSentence: An internship is a great way to gain experience.
words.laoTranslation: ເກັບກ່ຽວປະສົບການ (keb kiao pa-sob kan)
words.thaiTranslation: เก็บเกี่ยวประสบการณ์ (kep-kiao pra-sop-kan)

words.definition: To examine or view something briefly.
words.exampleSentence: Let me have a look at your report before you submit it.
words.laoTranslation: ເບິ່ງ / ກວດເບິ່ງ (beung / kuat beung)
words.thaiTranslation: ดู / ตรวจดู (du / truat du)

words.definition: To not tell anyone else what someone has told you.
words.exampleSentence: Can you keep a secret? I am planning a surprise party.
words.laoTranslation: ຮັກສາຄວາມລັບ (hak sa khuam lab)
words.thaiTranslation: รักษาความลับ (rak-sa khwam lap)

words.definition: To do something faster or more efficiently.
words.exampleSentence: Taking the highway will save time.
words.laoTranslation: ປະຢັດເວລາ (pa-yad we-la)
words.thaiTranslation: ประหยัดเวลา (pra-yat we-la)

words.definition: To watch, listen to, or think about something carefully.
words.exampleSentence: Please pay attention to the teacher during class.
words.laoTranslation: ຕັ້ງໃຈ / ເອົາໃຈໃສ່ (tang chai / ao chai sai)
words.thaiTranslation: ตั้งใจ / ใส่ใจ (tang-chai / sai-chai)

words.definition: To manage or control a company.
words.exampleSentence: My uncle runs a small grocery business in town.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍລິຫານທຸລະກິດ (bor-li-han thu-la-kit)
words.thaiTranslation: บริหารธุรกิจ (bo-ri-han thu-ra-kit)

words.definition: To alter your opinion or decision.
words.exampleSentence: If you change your mind, let me know before Friday.
words.laoTranslation: ປ່ຽນໃຈ (piang chai)
words.thaiTranslation: เปลี่ยนใจ (plian chai)

words.definition: To create a dangerous situation or risk.
words.exampleSentence: Cyber attacks pose a major threat to national security.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນໄພຂົ່ມຂູ່ (pen phai khom khu)
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นภัยคุกคาม (pen phai khuk-kham)

words.definition: To provide what is wanted or needed.
words.exampleSentence: The company increased production to meet the high demand.
words.laoTranslation: ຕອບສະໜອງຄວາມຕ້ອງການ (tob sa-nong khuam tong kan)
words.thaiTranslation: ตอบสนองความต้องการ (top-sa-nong khwam tong-kan)

words.definition: A state of being extremely poor and hopeless.
words.exampleSentence: Millions of people worldwide still live in abject poverty.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມທຸກຍາກລຳບາກແສນສາຫັດ (khuam thuk nyak lam bak saen sa hat)
words.thaiTranslation: ความยากจนข้นแค้น (khwam yak-chon khon-khaen)

words.definition: Very harsh, severe, and cruel criticism.
words.exampleSentence: The movie received scathing criticism from the reviewers.
words.laoTranslation: ການວິພາກວິຈານຢ່າງຮຸນແຮງ (kan wi-phak wi-chan yang hun-haeng)
words.thaiTranslation: การวิพากษ์วิจารณ์อย่างรุนแรง (kan wi-phak wi-chan yang run-raeng)

words.definition: A total and complete failure.
words.exampleSentence: The launch of the product was an unmitigated disaster.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຫາຍະນະຢ່າງສິ້ນເຊີງ (khuam ha-ya-na yang sin seung)
words.thaiTranslation: ความหายนะอย่างสิ้นเชิง (khwam ha-ya-na yang sin-choeng)

words.definition: Facts or details that make a crime or mistake seem less serious or easier to forgive.
words.exampleSentence: The judge considered the suspect's youth as one of the mitigating factors.
words.laoTranslation: ປັດໄຈຜ່ອນຜັນ (pat-chai phon phan)
words.thaiTranslation: ปัจจัยผ่อนปรน / เหตุบรรเทาโทษ (pat-chai phon-pron)

words.definition: Connected so closely that they cannot be separated.
words.exampleSentence: Our health is inextricably linked to the quality of our environment.
words.laoTranslation: ຜູກພັນກັນຢ່າງແຍກບໍ່ອອກ (phuk phan kan yang yaek bor ok)
words.thaiTranslation: ผูกพันกันอย่างแยกไม่ออก (phuk-phan kan yang yaek mai ok)

words.definition: Strong and constant support or allegiance that never changes.
words.exampleSentence: The captain demanded unswerving loyalty from his crew members.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຈົງຮັກພັກດີຢ່າງໝັ້ນຄົງ (khuam chong hak phak di yang man khong)
words.thaiTranslation: ความจงรักภักดีอย่างมั่นคงไม่มีวันเปลี่ยนแปลง (khwam chong-rak phak-di)

words.definition: To take care of someone or something.
words.exampleSentence: Can you look after my cat while I am on vacation?
words.laoTranslation: ເບິ່ງແຍງ (beung nyaeng)
words.thaiTranslation: ดูแล (du-lae)

words.definition: To cancel an event or an agreement.
words.exampleSentence: They had to call off the football match because of the heavy rain.
words.laoTranslation: ຍົກເລີກ (yok lek)
words.thaiTranslation: ยกเลิก (yok-loek)

words.definition: To raise a child or to mention a topic in conversation.
words.exampleSentence: Please don't bring up politics during dinner.
words.laoTranslation: ລ້ຽງດູ / ຍົກຫົວຂໍ້ຂຶ້ນມາ (liang du / yok hua kho khuen ma)
words.thaiTranslation: เลี้ยงดู / หยิบยกประเด็น (liang-du / yip-yok pra-den)

words.definition: To finish the supply of something so that you have none left.
words.exampleSentence: We have run out of milk, so I need to go to the shop.
words.laoTranslation: ໝົດ (mot)
words.thaiTranslation: หมด (mot)

words.definition: To delay doing something until a later date.
words.exampleSentence: Never put off until tomorrow what you can do today.
words.laoTranslation: ເລື່ອນເວລາອອກໄປ (leuan we-la ok pai)
words.thaiTranslation: เลื่อนเวลาออกไป (luan we-la ok pai)

words.definition: To feel excited or happy about something that is going to happen.
words.exampleSentence: I am looking forward to hearing from you soon.
words.laoTranslation: ຕັ້ງໜ້າຕັ້ງຕາຄອຍຖ້າ (tang na tang ta khoy tha)
words.thaiTranslation: ตั้งหน้าตั้งตารอคอย (tang-na-tang-ta ro-khoi)

words.definition: To discover a fact or piece of information.
words.exampleSentence: Visit our website to find out more details.
words.laoTranslation: ຊອກຮູ້ / ຄົ້ນພົບ (xok hu / khon phob)
words.thaiTranslation: ค้นพบ / หาความจริง (khon-pohb / ha khwam-ching)

words.definition: To treat or describe something bad or unpleasant as if it were not serious, in order to avoid dealing with it.
words.exampleSentence: The report completely glossed over the company's financial failures.
words.laoTranslation: ມອງຂ້າມ / ປົກປິດຄວາມຜິດ (mong kham / pok pid khuam phid)
words.thaiTranslation: มองข้ามความผิด / กลบเกลื่อน (mong kham khwam phit / klop-kluan)

words.definition: To obtain or win something with a lot of effort; or to make a small supply last a long time.
words.exampleSentence: They managed to eke out a living on a very small piece of land.
words.laoTranslation: ດິ້ນຮົນເພື່ອຫາລ້ຽງຊີບ (din hon pheua ha liang xip)
words.thaiTranslation: กระเบียดกระเสียน / หาเลี้ยงชีพด้วยความยากลำบาก (kra-biat-kra-sian)

words.definition: To waste money, time, or an opportunity little by little on unimportant things.
words.exampleSentence: He frittered away his inheritance on expensive gadgets and parties.
words.laoTranslation: ເສຍ...ໄປກັບສິ່ງບໍ່ມີປະໂຫຍດ (sia ... pai kab sing bor mi pa-nyot)
words.thaiTranslation: ผลาญเงินหรือเวลาไปกับสิ่งไร้สาระ (phlan ngen rue we-la)

words.definition: Lasting only a short time or using few words.
words.exampleSentence: The manager gave a brief presentation before the main meeting began.
words.laoTranslation: ສັ້ນໆ / ຫຍໍ້ (san san / nyo)
words.thaiTranslation: สั้นๆ / สังเขป (san-san / sang-khep)

words.definition: An agreement in an argument achieved by each side changing or giving up some demands.
words.exampleSentence: After hours of negotiation, they finally reached a compromise.
words.laoTranslation: ການປະນີປະນອມ (kan pa-ni pa-nom)
words.thaiTranslation: การประนีประนอม (kan pra-ni-pra-nom)

words.definition: To notice or understand the difference between two things.
words.exampleSentence: It's sometimes difficult to distinguish between lookalike species.
words.laoTranslation: ຈຳແນກ / ແຍກແຍະ (cham naek / yaek yae)
words.thaiTranslation: จำแนก / แยกแยะ (cham-naek / yaek-yae)

words.definition: To judge or calculate the quality, importance, amount, or value of something.
words.exampleSentence: We need to evaluate the results of the marketing campaign.
words.laoTranslation: ປະເມີນຜົນ (pa-moen phon)
words.thaiTranslation: ประเมินผล (pra-moen-phon)

words.definition: Happening often.
words.exampleSentence: Charles is a frequent visitor to our local library.
words.laoTranslation: ດຸໝັ່ນ / ເລື້ອຍໆ (du man / leuay leuay)
words.thaiTranslation: บ่อยครั้ง / เป็นประจำ (boi-khrang / pen pra-cham)

words.definition: A promise that something will be done or will happen, especially in writing.
words.exampleSentence: The electronic brand offers a two-year guarantee on all laptops.
words.laoTranslation: ຮັບປະກັນ (hab pa-kan)
words.thaiTranslation: รับประกัน / การันตี (rap-pra-kan / ka-ran-ti)

words.definition: To pause before you do or say something, often because you are uncertain.
words.exampleSentence: If you need any help, please do not hesitate to ask.
words.laoTranslation: ລັງເລ (lang le)
words.thaiTranslation: ลังเล (lang-le)

words.definition: To decide on or explain the meaning of something.
words.exampleSentence: How do you interpret the latest sales numbers?
words.laoTranslation: ແປ / ຕີຄວາມໝາຍ (pae / ti khuam mai)
words.thaiTranslation: ตีความ / แปลความหมาย (ti-khwam / plae khwam-mai)

words.definition: To take a longer time than necessary to leave or disappear.
words.exampleSentence: The smell of fresh coffee lingered in the kitchen for hours.
words.laoTranslation: ອ້ອຍອິ່ງ / ຍັງເຫຼືອຢູ່ (oy ing / nyang leuah yu)
words.thaiTranslation: อ้อยอิ่ง / ยังเหลืออยู่ (oi-ing / yang luea yu)

words.definition: To change something slightly, especially to improve it or make it more acceptable.
words.exampleSentence: We had to modify our travel plans due to the weather warning.
words.laoTranslation: ດັດແປງ / ປ່ຽນແປງ (dat paeng / piang paeng)
words.thaiTranslation: ดัดแปลง / แก้ไขเล็กน้อย (dat-plaeng / kae-khai lek-noi)

words.definition: Based on real facts and not influenced by personal beliefs or feelings.
words.exampleSentence: A judge must remain completely objective throughout the entire trial.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນກາງ / ເປົ້າໝາຍ (pen kang / pao mai)
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นกลาง / วัตถุประสงค์ (pen klang / wat-thu-pra-song)

words.definition: To say that an event or action will happen in the future.
words.exampleSentence: Meteorologists predict a heavy storm later tonight.
words.laoTranslation: ທຳນາຍ / ຄາດເດົາ (tham nai / khat dao)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำนาย / คาดเดา (tham-nai / khat-dao)

words.definition: Not wanting to do something and therefore slow to do it.
words.exampleSentence: Many parents are reluctant to let their children play dangerous sports.
words.laoTranslation: ບໍ່ເຕັມໃຈ / ລັງເລ (bor tem chai / lang le)
words.thaiTranslation: ไม่เต็มใจ / ไม่เต็มใจทำ (mai tem-chai / rang-re)

words.definition: Speed and eager readiness.
words.exampleSentence: She accepted the job offer with alacrity and packed her bags.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມກະຕືລືລົ້ນຢ່າງວ່ອງໄວ (khuam ka-teu-leu-lon yang wong wai)
words.thaiTranslation: ความกระตือรือร้นและว่องไว (khwam kra-tue-rue-ron lae wong-wai)

words.definition: Understanding or having knowledge of something.
words.exampleSentence: We should be fully cognizant of the legal risks before launching the app.
words.laoTranslation: ຮັບຮູ້ / ຮູ້ເຖິງ (hab hu / hu theung)
words.thaiTranslation: ตระหนักรู้ / รับรู้ (tra-nak ru / rap-ru)

words.definition: Giving too much attention to small details and wanting everything to be perfect.
words.exampleSentence: He is so fastidious about his clothes that everything must be perfectly pressed.
words.laoTranslation: ຈູ້ຈີ້ / ລະອຽດລະອໍເກີນໄປ (chu chi / la-iad la-or koen pai)
words.thaiTranslation: พิถีพิถันมาก / เจ้าระเบียบ (phi-thi-phi-than mak / chao-ra-biap)

words.definition: Never stopping, especially in an annoying or unpleasant way.
words.exampleSentence: The incessant noise from the nearby construction area kept us awake all night.
words.laoTranslation: ຕໍ່ເນື່ອງບໍ່ຢຸດ (tor neuang bor yut)
words.thaiTranslation: ต่อเนื่องไม่หยุดหย่อน (to-nuang mai yut-yon)

words.definition: Having a very harmful effect on somebody/something, especially in a gradual, unnoticeable way.
words.exampleSentence: Fake news has a pernicious influence on democratic elections.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນອັນຕະລາຍຮ້າຍແຮງແບບມິດ (pen an-ta-lai hai haeng baep mit)
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นอันตรายร้ายแรงและซ่อนเร้น (pen an-ta-rai rai-raeng lae son-ren)

words.definition: Tending not to speak very much, in a way that seems unfriendly.
words.exampleSentence: My grandfather was a taciturn man who rarely shared his feelings.
words.laoTranslation: ປາກໜັກ / ບໍ່ຄ່ອຍເວົ້າ (pak nak / bor khoy wao)
words.thaiTranslation: เงียบขรึม / ไม่ค่อยพูด (ngiep-khruem / mai khoi phut)

words.definition: To try as hard as you can to achieve something.
words.exampleSentence: Don't worry about the final score; just do your best.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ດີທີ່ສຸດ (het hai di thi sut)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้ดีที่สุด (tham hai di thi-sut)

words.definition: To choose something after thinking about the possibilities.
words.exampleSentence: It is time for us to make a decision about our next venue.
words.laoTranslation: ຕັດສິນໃຈ (tat sin chai)
words.thaiTranslation: ตัดสินใจ (tat-sin-chai)

words.definition: To take a risk in the hope of achieving a good result.
words.exampleSentence: You should take a chance and apply for that international scholarship.
words.laoTranslation: ສ່ຽງເບິ່ງ (siang beung)
words.thaiTranslation: เสี่ยงดู / ลองเสี่ยงโชค (siang-du)

words.definition: To maintain regular communication with someone.
words.exampleSentence: Let's keep in touch after you move back to your hometown.
words.laoTranslation: ຕິດຕໍ່ກັນຢູ່ເລື້ອຍໆ (tit tor kan yu leuay leuay)
words.thaiTranslation: ติดต่อกันอยู่เสมอ (tit-to kan yu sa-moe)

words.definition: To say something nice to someone to show praise or admiration.
words.exampleSentence: He paid her a lovely compliment on her presentation skills.
words.laoTranslation: ຍ້ອງຍໍ (nyong nyo)
words.thaiTranslation: กล่าวชม / ชมเชย (klao-chom / chom-choei)

words.definition: To remember or consider a specific piece of information.
words.exampleSentence: Bear in mind that offices are closed on national holidays.
words.laoTranslation: ຈື່ໄວ້ / ຄຳນຶງເຖິງ (cheu wai / kham neung theung)
words.thaiTranslation: จำใส่ใจไว้ / คำนึงถึง (cham sai-chai wai / kham-nueng theung)

words.definition: A large number of vehicles on the road causing slow movement.
words.exampleSentence: I missed my early flight due to heavy traffic on the expressway.
words.laoTranslation: ລົດຕິດຫຼາຍ (lot tit lai)
words.thaiTranslation: รถติดมาก / การจราจรติดขัด (rot-tit mak)

words.definition: Very structures or conditions that are not expected to happen.
words.exampleSentence: It is highly unlikely that the project will be finished early.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນໄປໄດ້ຍາກຫຼາຍ (pen pai dai nyak lai)
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นไปได้ยากมาก (pen-pai-dai yak mak)

words.definition: To decide on something that you hope to achieve.
words.exampleSentence: You must set a goal if you want to stay motivated during your studies.
words.laoTranslation: ຕັ້ງເປົ້າໝາຍ (tang pao mai)
words.thaiTranslation: ตั้งเป้าหมาย (tang pao-mai)

words.definition: To make people feel more comfortable in a social situation.
words.exampleSentence: A quick introductory game is an excellent way to break the ice.
words.laoTranslation: ທຳລາຍຄວາມອຶດອັດ / ເລີ່ມຕົ້ນເຮັດຄວາມລຸ້ນເຄີຍ (tham lai khuam eut at)
words.thaiTranslation: ละลายพฤติกรรม / ทำความคุ้นเคย (la-lai phruet-ti-kam)

words.definition: An overwhelming or very large percentage of a group.
words.exampleSentence: The vast majority of employees voted in favor of the new policy.
words.laoTranslation: ສ່ວນໃຫຍ່ສ່ວນຫຼາຍ (suan yai suan lai)
words.thaiTranslation: ส่วนใหญ่เป็นส่วนมาก (suan-yai pen suan-mak)

words.definition: To deal with a difficult situation or problem directly.
words.exampleSentence: Our sales team will face a massive challenge this quarter.
words.laoTranslation: ເຜີຊີນໜ້າກັບຄວາມທ້າທາຍ (pheu xin na kab khuam tha thai)
words.thaiTranslation: เผชิญหน้ากับความท้าทาย (pha-choen-na kap khwam-tha-thai)

words.definition: To expand your knowledge, experience, or understanding of the world.
words.exampleSentence: Traveling alone across Asia will certainly broaden your horizons.
words.laoTranslation: ເປີດຫູເປີດຕາ / ເປີດໂລກກະທັດ (poet hu poet ta)
words.thaiTranslation: เปิดหูเปิดตา / เปิดโลกทัศน์ (poet-hu-poet-ta)

words.definition: An unfair comparison or distinction that is likely to cause resentment or anger.
words.exampleSentence: The manager made an invidious distinction between the senior workers.
words.laoTranslation: ການປຽບທຽບທີ່ບໍ່ຍຸດຕິທຳແລະພາໃຫ້ຜິດຖຽງກັນ (kan piap thiap thi bor yut-ti-tham)
words.thaiTranslation: การเปรียบเทียบที่ไม่เป็นธรรมและก่อให้เกิดความแตกแยก (kan priap-thiap)

words.definition: Very strong proof that completely convinces you that something is true.
words.exampleSentence: The prosecutors presented compelling evidence that linked him to the scene.
words.laoTranslation: ຫຼັກຖານທີ່ໜັກແໜ້ນແລະໜ້າເຊື່ອຖື (lak than thi nak naen)
words.thaiTranslation: หลักฐานที่แน่นหนาและน่าเชื่อถือ (lak-than thi naen-na)

words.definition: Completely wrong about a situation or a fact, with potentially serious consequences.
words.exampleSentence: If you think the market will recover instantly, you are gravely mistaken.
words.laoTranslation: ເຂົ້າໃຈຜິດຢ່າງຮ້າຍແຮງ (khao chai phid yang hai haeng)
words.thaiTranslation: เข้าใจผิดอย่างมหันต์ (khao-chai phit yang ma-han)

words.definition: An obvious, shameless, and total lack of respect or care for rules or feelings.
words.exampleSentence: The driver showed a blatant disregard for safety regulations.
words.laoTranslation: ການເມີນເສີຍ / ລະເລີຍຢ່າງຈະແຈ້ງ (kan moen soei / la loei yang cha chaeng)
words.thaiTranslation: การเพิกเฉยอย่างชัดเจนไร้ยางอาย (kan phoek-choei)

words.definition: Severe or radical actions taken to solve a critical issue.
words.exampleSentence: The government took drastic measures to curb hyperinflation.
words.laoTranslation: ມາດຕະການຂັ້ນຮຸນແຮງ (mat-ta-kan khan hun haeng)
words.thaiTranslation: มาตรการขั้นรุนแรง / ยาแรง (mat-tra-kan khan run-raeng)

words.definition: A state of mental discomfort caused by holding two conflicting beliefs simultaneously.
words.exampleSentence: Smoking despite knowing it causes cancer creates heavy cognitive dissonance.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຂັດແຍ່ງທາງຈິດໃຈ (khuam khat nyaeng thang chit chai)
words.thaiTranslation: ความย้อนแย้งทางความคิด / ความไม่สอดคล้องทางพุทธิปัญญา (khwam yon-yaeng)

words.definition: To stop trying to do something, often because it is too difficult.
words.exampleSentence: Never give up on your dreams, no matter how hard it gets.
words.laoTranslation: ຍອມແພ້ / ເຊົາພະຍາຍາມ (nyom phae / xao pha-nya-nyam)
words.thaiTranslation: ยอมแพ้ / ล้มเลิก (yom-phae / lom-loek)

words.definition: To reject or refuse an offer, request, or application.
words.exampleSentence: She turned down the job offer because the salary was too low.
words.laoTranslation: ປະຕິເສດ (pa-ti-set)
words.thaiTranslation: ปฏิเสธ (pa-ti-set)

words.definition: To continue doing something.
words.exampleSentence: You must carry on with your studies even when it is boring.
words.laoTranslation: ດຳເນີນຕໍ່ໄປ / ເຮັດຕໍ່ໄປ (dam noen tor pai)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำต่อไป / ดำเนินต่อไป (tham to-pai)

words.definition: To leave the ground and fly (for aircraft), or to become successful quickly.
words.exampleSentence: The plane took off exactly on schedule despite the heavy rain.
words.laoTranslation: ບິນຂຶ້ນ / ປະສົບຄວາມສຳເລັດໄວ (bin khuen)
words.thaiTranslation: บินขึ้น / ประสบความสำเร็จอย่างรวดเร็ว (bin-khuen)

words.definition: To wait for a short time, or to grip something tightly.
words.exampleSentence: Please hold on for a moment while I check your file.
words.laoTranslation: ຖ້າບຶດໜຶ່ງ / ຈັບໄວ້ໃຫ້ແໜ້ນ (tha beut neung)
words.thaiTranslation: รอสักครู่ / จับไว้ให้แน่น (ro sak-khru)

words.definition: To investigate or examine the facts about a problem or situation.
words.exampleSentence: The technical support team is looking into the server issue right now.
words.laoTranslation: ກວດສອບ / ສືບສວນ (kuat sop / sieb suan)
words.thaiTranslation: ตรวจสอบ / สอบสวนหาความจริง (truat-sop)

words.definition: To have a friendly relationship with someone.
words.exampleSentence: Do you get along with your new office colleagues?
words.laoTranslation: ເຂົ້າກັນໄດ້ດີ (khao kan dai di)
words.thaiTranslation: เข้ากันได้ดีกับ... (khao-kan-dai-di)

words.definition: To suddenly refuse to speak, typically because of nervousness, fear, or secrets.
words.exampleSentence: As soon as the investigators started asking about the money, he clammed up.
words.laoTranslation: ມິດງຽບທັນທີ / ບໍ່ຍອມເວົ້າ (mit ngiep than ti / bor nyom wao)
words.thaiTranslation: เงียบสนิท / ปิดปากเงียบไม่ยอมพูด (ngiep sa-nit)

words.definition: To gradually decrease, become smaller or weaker, and then stop completely.
words.exampleSentence: The protest path petered out as the heavy rainfall began.
words.laoTranslation: ຄ່ອຍໆໝົດໄປ / ມອດລົງ (khoy khoy mot pai)
words.thaiTranslation: ค่อยๆ หมดไป / แผ่วลงจนเงียบหายไป (khoi-khoi mot-pai)

words.definition: To talk or complain about something repeatedly and in an annoying way.
words.exampleSentence: I know I made a mistake, but you don't need to keep harping on it.
words.laoTranslation: ເວົ້າຊ້ຳໆຊາກໆ / ຈົ່ມເລື້ອຍໆ (wao sam sam xak xak)
words.thaiTranslation: พูดซ้ำซาก / บ่นเรื่องเดิมๆ ไม่รู้จบ (phut sam-sak)

words.definition: To succeed in doing something good or difficult.
words.exampleSentence: She managed to accomplish the task before noon.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ສຳເລັດ
words.thaiTranslation: ความสำเร็จ / ทำให้สำเร็จ

words.definition: Correct, exact, and without any mistakes.
words.exampleSentence: The weather forecast was surprisingly accurate.
words.laoTranslation: ຖືກຕ້ອງ
words.thaiTranslation: ถูกต้อง / แม่นยำ

words.definition: To have enough money to buy something.
words.exampleSentence: I cannot afford to buy a new car this year.
words.laoTranslation: ຊື້ໄດ້/ມີເງິນພໍ
words.thaiTranslation: ซื้อได้ / มีเงินพอซื้อ

words.definition: From a long time ago; very old.
words.exampleSentence: They visited an ancient temple in the jungle.
words.laoTranslation: ບູຮານ
words.thaiTranslation: โบราณ / เก่าแก่

words.definition: Worried and nervous about something.
words.exampleSentence: He felt anxious about the upcoming English exam.
words.laoTranslation: ກັງວົນ
words.thaiTranslation: วิตกกังวล / กังวลใจ

words.definition: To plan or organize something in advance.
words.exampleSentence: Can we arrange a meeting for next Monday?
words.laoTranslation: ຈັດແຈງ / ຈັດວາງ
words.thaiTranslation: จัดการ / จัดเตรียม

words.definition: Something on sale at a lower price than its true value.
words.exampleSentence: This jacket was a real bargain at only ten dollars.
words.laoTranslation: ຂອງຖືກ / ລາຄາຖືກ
words.thaiTranslation: ของถูก / สินค้าราคาพิเศษ

words.definition: To act in a particular way, normally good.
words.exampleSentence: The children behaved very well at the restaurant.
words.laoTranslation: ປະພຶດ / ວางຕົວ
words.thaiTranslation: ประพฤติตน / วางตัวดี

words.definition: To take something to use and return it later.
words.exampleSentence: May I borrow your pen for a second?
words.laoTranslation: ຢືມ
words.thaiTranslation: ขอยืม

words.definition: Lasting only for a short time; using few words.
words.exampleSentence: The manager gave a brief explanation of the rules.
words.laoTranslation: ສັ້ນ / ຫຍໍ້
words.thaiTranslation: สั้น / สรุปย่อ

words.definition: A period of one hundred years.
words.exampleSentence: This church was built in the nineteenth century.
words.laoTranslation: ສັດຕະວັດ
words.thaiTranslation: ศตวรรษ (รอบ 100 ปี)

words.definition: Something new and difficult which requires effort.
words.exampleSentence: Learning a new language is a great challenge.
words.laoTranslation: ສິ່ງທ້າທาย
words.thaiTranslation: สิ่งท้าทาย

words.definition: To say that something is wrong or not good.
words.exampleSentence: Customers complain about the slow internet service.
words.laoTranslation: ຈົ່ມ / ຮ້ອງທຸກ
words.thaiTranslation: บ่น / ร้องเรียน

words.definition: To state or prove that an arrangement is true.
words.exampleSentence: Please call to confirm your flight reservation.
words.laoTranslation: ຢືນຢັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ยืนยัน

words.definition: Very pleased and happy about something.
words.exampleSentence: She was delighted with her birthday gifts.
words.laoTranslation: ດີໃຈຫຼາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ยินดีอย่างยิ่ง / ดีใจมาก

words.definition: To say what someone or something is like.
words.exampleSentence: Can you describe the man you saw yesterday?
words.laoTranslation: ອະທິບາຍ / ພັນລະນາ
words.thaiTranslation: อธิบาย / บรรยายลักษณะ

words.definition: The place where someone or something is going.
words.exampleSentence: Spain is a popular holiday destination for tourists.
words.laoTranslation: ຈຸດໝາຍປາຍທາງ
words.thaiTranslation: จุดหมายปลายทาง

words.definition: The process of finding information for the first time.
words.exampleSentence: The discovery of America changed world history.
words.laoTranslation: ການຄົ້ນພົບ
words.thaiTranslation: การค้นพบ

words.definition: To receive money as payment for work that you do.
words.exampleSentence: How much does a beginner teacher earn there?
words.laoTranslation: ຫາເงິນໄດ້
words.thaiTranslation: ได้รับรายได้ / หาเงินได้

words.definition: To give someone support, confidence, or hope.
words.exampleSentence: My parents always encourage me to study hard.
words.laoTranslation: ໃຫ້ກຳລັງໃຈ
words.thaiTranslation: ให้กำลังใจ / สนับสนุน

words.definition: The air, water, and land in which people live.
words.exampleSentence: We must do more to protect our natural environment.
words.laoTranslation: ສິ່ງແວດລ້ອມ
words.thaiTranslation: สิ่งแวดล้อม

words.definition: Easy to recognize because of being seen before.
words.exampleSentence: Your face looks familiar, have we met before?
words.laoTranslation: ຄຸ້ນເຄີຍ
words.thaiTranslation: คุ้นเคย / เคยเห็น

words.definition: Happening often or repeatedly.
words.exampleSentence: There is a frequent bus service to the capital city.
words.laoTranslation: ດຸ / ເລື້ອຍໆ
words.thaiTranslation: บ่อย / เป็นประจำ

words.definition: Willing to give money, help, or kindness freely.
words.exampleSentence: It was very generous of you to buy me lunch.
words.laoTranslation: ໃຈກວ້າງ
words.thaiTranslation: ใจกว้าง / เอื้อเฟื้อ

words.definition: To make something better than it was before.
words.exampleSentence: I practice English every day to improve my skills.
words.laoTranslation: ປັບປຸງ / ເຮັດໃຫ້ດີຂຶ້ນ
words.thaiTranslation: ปรับปรุง / ทำให้ดีขึ้น

words.definition: One of the foods that you use to make a dish.
words.exampleSentence: Flour is the main ingredient in making bread.
words.laoTranslation: ສ່ວນປະສົມ
words.thaiTranslation: ส่วนผสม / วัตถุดิบ

words.definition: A person who lives next to or near you.
words.exampleSentence: Our new neighbor invited us over for a tea.
words.laoTranslation: ເພື່ອນບ້ານ
words.thaiTranslation: เพื่อนบ้าน

words.definition: Completely different or facing something else.
words.exampleSentence: The bookstore is on the opposite side of the road.
words.laoTranslation: ກົງກັນຂ້າມ
words.thaiTranslation: ตรงกันข้าม

words.definition: To get or be given something by someone.
words.exampleSentence: Did you receive the email I sent this morning?
words.laoTranslation: ໄດ້ຮັບ
words.thaiTranslation: ได้รับ

words.definition: To make something smaller in size or amount.
words.exampleSentence: The shop decided to reduce prices by ten percent.
words.laoTranslation: ຫຼຸດລົງ
words.thaiTranslation: ลดลง / ลดราคา

words.definition: To take care of someone or something.
words.exampleSentence: She stays home to look after her younger brother.
words.laoTranslation: ເບິ່ງແຍງ / ລ້ຽງດູ
words.thaiTranslation: ดูแล / เลี้ยงดู

words.definition: To discover a fact or piece of information.
words.exampleSentence: I need to find out what time the train leaves.
words.laoTranslation: ຊອກຮູ້ / ຄົ້ນພົບ
words.thaiTranslation: ค้นหาความจริง / สืบรู้

words.definition: To stop trying to do something.
words.exampleSentence: Never give up on your dreams of learning English.
words.laoTranslation: ຍອมແພ້ / ເລີກລົ້ມ
words.thaiTranslation: ยอมแพ้ / เลิกทำ

words.definition: To cancel an event that was planned.
words.exampleSentence: They had to call off the football match due to rain.
words.laoTranslation: ຍົກເລີກ
words.thaiTranslation: ยกเลิก

words.definition: To start a machine or light by a switch.
words.exampleSentence: Could you turn on the light? It's dark.
words.laoTranslation: ເປີດໄຟ / ເປີດເຄື່ອງ
words.thaiTranslation: เปิด (ไฟ, เครื่องใช้ไฟฟ้า)

words.definition: To stop a machine or light by a switch.
words.exampleSentence: Remember to turn off the TV before going to bed.
words.laoTranslation: ປິດໄຟ / ປິດເຄື່ອງ
words.thaiTranslation: ปิด (ไฟ, เครื่องใช้ไฟฟ้า)

words.definition: To open your eyes and awake after sleeping.
words.exampleSentence: I usually wake up at 6 AM every morning.
words.laoTranslation: ຕື່ນນອນ
words.thaiTranslation: ตื่นนอน

words.definition: To change from being a child to being an adult.
words.exampleSentence: He grew up in a small village in Laos.
words.laoTranslation: ເຕີບໃຫຍ່
words.thaiTranslation: เติบโต / โตขึ้น

words.definition: To try to find someone or something.
words.exampleSentence: I am looking for my keys. Have you seen them?
words.laoTranslation: ຊອກຫາ
words.thaiTranslation: มองหา / ค้นหา

words.definition: To try as hard as you can in a task.
words.exampleSentence: Don't worry about the score, just do your best.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ດີທີ່ສຸດ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้อย่างดีที่สุด / พยายามสุดความสามารถ

words.definition: To do something incorrectly or error.
words.exampleSentence: It's okay to make a mistake when learning.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດຜິດພາດ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำผิดพลาด

words.definition: To stop working or resting for a short time.

words.definition: To voice worry or anxiety about a specific situation.
words.exampleSentence: Local residents expressed concern over the safety of the new bridge.
words.laoTranslation: ສະແດງຄວາມເປັນຫ່ວງ (sa-daeng khuam pen huang)
words.thaiTranslation: แสดงความกังวลใจ / เป็นห่วง (sa-daeng khwam kang-won)

words.definition: A discouraging or frightening effect, especially on freedom of speech.
words.exampleSentence: The harsh new security laws had a chilling effect on local journalism.
words.laoTranslation: ຜົນກະທົບທີ່ເຮັດໃຫ້ຢ້ານກົວ / ຫຼຸດເສລີພາບ (phon ka-thob thi het hai yan kua)
words.thaiTranslation: ผลกระทบที่ทำให้หวาดกลัวหรือลดทอนเสรีภาพ (phon kra-thop thi tham hai wat-klua)

words.definition: Extremely clean; completely free from dirt or contamination.
words.exampleSentence: The hospital laboratory must be kept scrupulously clean at all times.
words.laoTranslation: ສະອາດບໍລິສຸດ / ປອດເຊື້ອຢ່າງສິ້ນເຊີງ (sa-at bo-li-sut)
words.thaiTranslation: สะอาดหมดจดอย่างไร้ที่ติ (sa-at mot-chot)

words.definition: To take and use something that belongs to someone else, with the intention of returning it.
words.exampleSentence: Can I borrow your pen for a second?
words.laoTranslation: ຢືມ (yuem)
words.thaiTranslation: ยืม (yuem)

words.definition: A period of one hundred years.
words.exampleSentence: This historic structure was built over a century ago.
words.laoTranslation: ສະຕະວັດ (sa-ta-wat)
words.thaiTranslation: ศตวรรษ (sa-ta-wat)

words.definition: Having a very pleasant taste or smell.
words.exampleSentence: The noodle soup at the market was delicious.
words.laoTranslation: ແຊບ (xaep)
words.thaiTranslation: อร่อย (a-roi)

words.definition: To search and discover about something or a place.
words.exampleSentence: We love to explore the natural caves in Vang Vieng.
words.laoTranslation: ສຳຫຼວດ (sam-luat)
words.thaiTranslation: สำรวจ (sam-ruat)

words.definition: Known and recognized by many people.
words.exampleSentence: Luang Prabang is famous for its beautiful night market.
words.laoTranslation: ມີຊື່ສຽງ (mi xeu siang)
words.thaiTranslation: มีชื่อเสียง (mi chue-siang)

words.definition: A person or book that shows the way or provides information.
words.exampleSentence: Our tour guide explained the history of the royal palace.
words.laoTranslation: ຜູ້ນຳທ່ຽວ / ແນະນຳ (phu nam thiao / nae nam)
words.thaiTranslation: ผู้นำเที่ยว / แนะนำ (phu-nam thiao)

words.definition: Strong and well; not sick.
words.exampleSentence: Eating fresh vegetables keeps you healthy.
words.laoTranslation: ມີສຸຂະພາບດີ (mi su-kha-phap di)
words.thaiTranslation: สุขภาพดี (su-kha-phap di)

words.definition: A piece of land completely surrounded by water.
words.exampleSentence: Si Phan Don means the Four Thousand Islands in southern Laos.
words.laoTranslation: ເກາະ / ດອນ (koh / don)
words.thaiTranslation: เกาะ (koh)

words.definition: To give something to someone for a short period of time, expecting it back.
words.exampleSentence: She agreed to lend me her laptop for the weekend project.
words.laoTranslation: ໃຫ້ຢືມ (hai yuem)
words.thaiTranslation: ให้ยืม (hai-yuem)

words.definition: A person living near or next door to you.
words.exampleSentence: My neighbor is very kind and always helps water my plants.
words.laoTranslation: ເພື່ອນບ້ານ (pheuan ban)
words.thaiTranslation: เพื่อนบ้าน (pheuan-ban)

words.definition: A thought or belief about something or someone.
words.exampleSentence: In my opinion, learning English online is highly effective.
words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຄິດເຫັນ (khuam khit hen)
words.thaiTranslation: ความคิดเห็น (khwam khit-hen)

words.definition: To keep someone or something safe from injury, damage, or loss.
words.exampleSentence: We need to protect national forests from illegal logging.
words.laoTranslation: ປົກປັກຮັກສາ / ປ້ອງກັນ (pok pak hak sa)
words.thaiTranslation: ปกป้อง / ป้องกัน (pok-pong)

words.definition: Making very little or no noise.
words.exampleSentence: The library is a very quiet place to focus on your studies.
words.laoTranslation: ງຽບ (ngiep)
words.thaiTranslation: เงียบ (ngiep)

words.definition: To make something smaller or less in size, amount, or price.
words.exampleSentence: Using public transport can reduce carbon emissions.
words.laoTranslation: ຫຼຸດລົງ (lut long)
words.thaiTranslation: ลดลง (lot-long)

words.definition: To give a part of something to others.
words.exampleSentence: Please share your data with the rest of the research team.
words.laoTranslation: ແບ່ງປັນ (baeng pan)
words.thaiTranslation: แบ่งปัน (baeng-pan)

words.definition: The number of vehicles moving along roads.
words.exampleSentence: The rush hour traffic in Vientiane can be quite slow.
words.laoTranslation: ການຈະລາຈອນ (kan cha-la-chon)
words.thaiTranslation: การจราจร (kan cha-ra-chon)

words.definition: Lasting only a short time or using few words.
words.exampleSentence: The director gave a brief summary of the project goals.
words.laoTranslation: ຫຍໍ້ / ສັ້ນໆ (nyor / san san)
words.thaiTranslation: ย่อ / สั้น / สังเขป (yo / san)

words.definition: To give something, especially money or support, to help achieve something.
words.exampleSentence: We want everyone to contribute ideas to the new community program.
words.laoTranslation: ປະກອບສ່ວນ (pa-kop suan)
words.thaiTranslation: มีส่วนร่วม / สมทบ / ช่วยเหลือ (mi suan-ruam)

words.definition: Including many different types of people or things.
words.exampleSentence: Laos has a highly diverse population with multiple ethnic groups.
words.laoTranslation: ຫຼາກຫຼາຍ / ແຕກຕ່າງກັນ (lak lai)
words.thaiTranslation: หลากหลาย / แตกต่างกัน (lak-lai)

words.definition: To judge or calculate the quality, importance, amount, or value of something.
words.exampleSentence: The expert will evaluate the soil quality for coffee planting.
words.laoTranslation: ປະເມີນຜົນ (pa-moen phon)
words.thaiTranslation: ประเมินผล (pra-moen-phon)

words.definition: Able to be made, done, or achieved logically.
words.exampleSentence: It is no longer feasible to complete the fieldwork without extra funding.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນໄປໄດ້ / ເຮັດໄດ້ຈິງ (pen pai dai)
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นไปได้ / สามารถปฏิบัติได้จริง (pen-pai-dai)

words.definition: Real and exactly what it appears or claims to be.
words.exampleSentence: The artifact turned out to be a genuine antique from the 16th century.
words.laoTranslation: ແທ້ຈິງ / ບໍລິສຸດ (thae ching)
words.thaiTranslation: แท้จริง / ของแท้ (thae-ching)

words.definition: To start using a plan, system, or law.
words.exampleSentence: The team needs to implement the new data collection protocol immediately.
words.laoTranslation: ຈັດຕັ້ງປະຕິບັດ / ນຳໃຊ້ (chat tang pa-ti-bat)
words.thaiTranslation: นำไปปฏิบัติ / เริ่มดำเนินการ (nam pai pra-ti-bat)

words.definition: To continue to have or keep something in good condition.
words.exampleSentence: Regular servicing helps to maintain the laboratory machinery.
words.laoTranslation: ຮັກສາ / ຮັກສາໄວ້ (hak sa)
words.thaiTranslation: บำรุงรักษา / คงไว้ (bam-rung-rak-sa)

words.definition: Something that blocks you so that movement, direction, or progress is difficult.
words.exampleSentence: Language barriers can be a minor obstacle during international projects.
words.laoTranslation: ອຸປະສັກ (u-pa-sak)
words.thaiTranslation: อุปสรรค (u-pra-sak)

words.definition: Enough for a particular purpose.
words.exampleSentence: Do we have sufficient data to draw a scientific conclusion?
words.laoTranslation: ພຽງພໍ (phiang pho)
words.thaiTranslation: เพียงพอ (phiang-pho)

words.definition: A person, thing, or custom that seems to belong to a different time period than the present.
words.exampleSentence: Using paper maps instead of GPS trackers feels like an anachronism today.
words.laoTranslation: ສິ່ງທີ່ຜິດຕໍ່ຍຸກສະໄໝ (sing thi phid tor yuk sa-mai)
words.thaiTranslation: การผิดยุคผิดสมัย / สิ่งที่ล้าสมัยไม่เข้ากับยุคปัจจุบัน (kan phit-yuk)

words.definition: To choose between different options after thinking.
words.exampleSentence: You need to make a decision about your future career path.
words.laoTranslation: ຕັດສິນໃຈ (tat sin chai)
words.thaiTranslation: ตัดสินใจ (tat-sin-chai)

words.definition: To stop an activity for a short time to rest.
words.exampleSentence: Let's take a break for ten minutes and get some fresh water.
words.laoTranslation: ພັກຜ່ອນ (phak phon)
words.thaiTranslation: พักผ่อน / พักสายตา (phak-phon)

words.definition: To study a subject in detail to discover new facts.
words.exampleSentence: Scientists do research to develop cleaner farming techniques.
words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດການວິໄຈ (het kan wi-chai)
words.thaiTranslation: ทำการวิจัย (tham kan-wi-chai)

words.definition: To become sick with a common winter virus.
words.exampleSentence: Wear a jacket so you don't catch a cold in the heavy rain.
words.laoTranslation: ເປັນຫວັດ (pen wat)
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นหวัด / จับไข้ (pen-wat)

words.definition: To watch, listen to, or think about something carefully.
words.exampleSentence: Please pay attention to the safety instructions at the start.
words.laoTranslation: ເອົາໃຈໃສ່ / ຕັ້ງໃຈ (ao chai sai)
words.thaiTranslation: ตั้งใจฟัง / ใส่ใจ (tang-chai fang)

words.definition: To do what you said you would definitely do.
words.exampleSentence: He is an honest manager; he always keeps a promise.
words.laoTranslation: ຮັກສາສັນຍາ (hak sa san-nya)
words.thaiTranslation: รักษาสัญญา (rak-sa san-ya)

words.definition: To use less time than usual to complete something.
words.exampleSentence: Taking the highway will save time on our morning trip.
words.laoTranslation: ປະຢັດເວລາ (pa-yad we-la)
words.thaiTranslation: ประหยัดเวลา (pra-yat we-la)

words.definition: To start feeling strong displeasure or rage.
words.exampleSentence: There is no reason to get angry about minor mistakes.
words.laoTranslation: ສູນ / ຄຽດ (sun / khiat)
words.thaiTranslation: โกรธ / โมโห (krot / mo-ho)

words.definition: To talk with someone about various topics.
words.exampleSentence: We had a long conversation about the field study outcomes.
words.laoTranslation: ສົນທະນາ (son-tha-na)
words.thaiTranslation: สนทนา / พูดคุยกัน (son-tha-na)

words.definition: To display and explain information to an audience.
words.exampleSentence: Tomorrow, she will give a presentation on sustainable agriculture.
words.laoTranslation: ນຳສະເໜີຜົນງານ (nam sa-noe phon ngan)
words.thaiTranslation: นำเสนอผลงาน / พรีเซนต์ (nam-sa-noe phol-ngan)

words.definition: To request support or advice from someone.
words.exampleSentence: If you don't understand the Excel script, ask for help.
words.laoTranslation: ຂໍຄວາມຊ່ວຍເຫຼືອ (kho khuam xuay leu)
words.thaiTranslation: ขอความช่วยเหลือ (kho khwam chuay-lue)

words.definition: Extremely sad or upset because something didn't happen.
words.exampleSentence: The team was bitterly disappointed when the project got delayed.
words.laoTranslation: ຜິດຫວັງຢ່າງຮຸນແຮງ (phid wang yang hun haeng)
words.thaiTranslation: ผิดหวังอย่างรุนแรง / เสียใจอย่างมาก (phit-wang yang run-raeng)

words.definition: To meet or deal with a difficult situation with courage.
words.exampleSentence: Small scale farmers face a major challenge from extreme weather changes.
words.laoTranslation: ຜະເຊີນໜ້າກັບຄວາມທ້າທາຍ (pha xoen na kab khuam tha thai)
words.thaiTranslation: เผชิญหน้ากับความท้าทาย (pha-choen-na kap khwam tha-thai)

words.definition: Expressing an extremely low opinion or harsh review.
words.exampleSentence: The report was highly critical of the old waste management plan.
words.laoTranslation: ວິພາກວິຈານຢ່າງຮຸນແຮງ (wi-phak wi-chan)
words.thaiTranslation: วิพากษ์วิจารณ์อย่างรุนแรง (wi-phak wi-chan)

words.definition: To show to be completely true by using clear facts or evidence.
words.exampleSentence: The laboratory tests conclusively prove the water contains biochar residue.
words.laoTranslation: ພິສູດໄດ້ຢ່າງຊັດເຈນ (phi-sut dai yang xad chen)
words.thaiTranslation: พิสูจน์ได้อย่างชัดเจนปราศจากข้อสงสัย (phi-sut-dai)

words.definition: Completely joined or bound together that they cannot be separated.
words.exampleSentence: Forest landscape health and rural farmer income are inextricably linked.
words.laoTranslation: ຜູກພັນກັນຢ່າງແຍກບໍ່ອອກ (phuk phan kan yang yaek bor ok)
words.thaiTranslation: ผูกพันกันอย่างแนบแน่นจนแยกไม่ออก (phuk-phan-kan)

words.definition: Formal, traditional, and impressive ceremony or public display.
words.exampleSentence: The diplomatic summit opened with immense pomp and circumstance.
words.laoTranslation: ພິທີການທີ່ສະຫງ່າງາມ / ຍິ່ງໃຫຍ່ (phi-thi-kan thi sa-nga ngam)
words.thaiTranslation: พิธีรีตองอันยิ่งใหญ่มโหฬารตามธรรมเนียม (phi-thi-ri-tong)

words.definition: To search for someone or something that is lost or needed.
words.exampleSentence: I need to look for my office keys before leaving.
words.laoTranslation: ຊອກຫາ (xok ha)
words.thaiTranslation: ตามหา / ค้นหา (tam-ha)

words.definition: To stop a machine or light from working by pressing a switch.
words.exampleSentence: Please turn off the air conditioner when you leave the conference room.
words.laoTranslation: ມອດ / ປິດ (mot / pid)
words.thaiTranslation: ปิด (ไฟ, เครื่องใช้ไฟฟ้า) (pit)

words.definition: To complete a formal application or document by writing information.
words.exampleSentence: You must fill out this visa form before passing customs.
words.laoTranslation: ຕື່ມຂໍ້ມູນໃສ່ (teum kho mun sai)
words.thaiTranslation: กรอกข้อมูล / กรอกแบบฟอร์ม (krok khou-mun)

words.definition: To gradually become an adult over time.
words.exampleSentence: He grew up in a beautiful village surrounded by mountains.
words.laoTranslation: ເຕີບໃຫຍ່ (toep yai)
words.thaiTranslation: เติบโต (toep-to)

words.definition: To put on a piece of clothing to see if it fits correctly.
words.exampleSentence: Can I try on this traditional shirt before buying it?
words.laoTranslation: ລອງເສື້ອ (long xua)
words.thaiTranslation: ลองเสื้อผ้า (long suea-pha)

words.definition: To feel excited or happy about something that is going to happen.
words.exampleSentence: We look forward to collaborating with your expert team.
words.laoTranslation: ຕັ້ງໜ້າຕັ້ງຕາລໍຖ້າ (tang na tang ta lor tha)
words.thaiTranslation: ตั้งหน้าตั้งตารอคอยด้วยความยินดี (tang-na tang-ta ro)

words.definition: To decide that an planned event will not happen; cancel.
words.exampleSentence: They had to call off the workshop due to unexpected floods.
words.laoTranslation: ຍົກເລີກ (nyok loek)
words.thaiTranslation: ยกเลิก (yok-loek)

words.definition: To investigate the facts about a problem or situation.
words.exampleSentence: The tech department promises to look into the data access error.
words.laoTranslation: ກວດສອບ / ສືບສວນ (kuat sop)
words.thaiTranslation: ตรวจสอบ / ตรวจตราหาข้อเท็จจริง (truat-sop)

words.definition: To delay doing something until a later time or date.
words.exampleSentence: Never put off saving your code changes until the end of the day.
words.laoTranslation: ເລື່ອນເວລາ (loean we-la)
words.thaiTranslation: เลื่อนเวลาออกไป (luen we-la)

words.definition: To gradually decrease, become smaller, or weaker before coming to an end completely.
words.exampleSentence: The historic stream started to peter out during the dry spell.
words.laoTranslation: ຄ່ອຍໆໝົດໄປ / ສິ້ນສຸດລົງ (khoi khoi mot pai)
words.thaiTranslation: ค่อยๆ แผ่วลง / ค่อยๆ หมดไปจนจบ (khoi-khoi phaew-long)

words.laoTranslation: ເຄົາລົບນັບຖື, ເອົາເປັນແບບຢ່າງ
words.thaiTranslation: เคารพนับถือ, ยกย่องชื่นชม
words.definition: Respect and admire someone.
words.exampleSentence: Schoolchildren need positive role models to look up to.

words.laoTranslation: ຈັດຕັ້ງ, ສ້າງຕັ້ງ / ຕິດຕັ້ງ
words.thaiTranslation: จัดตั้ง, ก่อตั้ง / ติดตั้งระบบ
words.definition: Establish a business, organization, or system.
words.exampleSentence: She plans to set up her own consulting firm next month.

words.laoTranslation: ຖອດແບບ, ຄືກັນກັບ (ພໍ່ແມ່)
words.thaiTranslation: ถอดแบบ, เหมือน (พ่อหรือแม่)
words.definition: Resemble a parent or relative in appearance or character.
words.exampleSentence: He takes after his father in his love for classical music.

words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ຫຼຸດລົງ / ໂຄ່ນລົ້ມ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้ลดลง / โค่นล้มอำนาจ
words.definition: Reduce costs/prices, or cause a government to lose power.
words.exampleSentence: The central bank actions managed to bring down inflation.

words.laoTranslation: ຫຼຸດພົ້ນຈາກການຖືກລົງໂທດ
words.thaiTranslation: รอดพ้นจากความผิด, ทำผิดแล้วไม่โดนลงโทษ
words.definition: Escape punishment for a wrongful action.
words.exampleSentence: He thought he could get away with cheating on the exam.

words.laoTranslation: ການກວດສອບຢ່າງລະອຽດ
words.thaiTranslation: การตรวจสอบอย่างละเอียด
words.definition: Critical observation or examination.
words.exampleSentence: The company's accounts were subjected to intense scrutiny.

words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ພົບເຫັນທົ່ວໄປ, ແຜ່ຫຼາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ที่พบได้บ่อย, แพร่หลาย
words.definition: Widespread in a particular area or at a particular time.
words.exampleSentence: These diseases are more prevalent among young children.

words.laoTranslation: ຜູ້ສະໜັບສະໜູນ, ທະນາຍຄວາມ
words.thaiTranslation: ผู้สนับสนุน, ผู้ให้การสนับสนุน
words.definition: A person who publicly supports or recommends a particular cause or policy.
words.exampleSentence: She is a passionate advocate for organic farming.

words.laoTranslation: ຜິດປົກກະຕິ, ແປກປະຫຼາດ
words.thaiTranslation: ผิดปกติ, แปลกแยกไป
words.definition: Deviating from what is standard, normal, or expected.
words.exampleSentence: The scientists noted an anomalous test result in the laboratory.

words.laoTranslation: ເສີມກຳລັງ, ສະໜັບສະໜູນ
words.thaiTranslation: เสริมกำลัง, สนับสนุนให้เข้มแข็ง
words.definition: Support or strengthen; prop up.
words.exampleSentence: The new evidence will bolster the defense's argument.

words.laoTranslation: ສອດຄ່ອງກັນ, ເປັນເຫດເປັນຜົນ
words.thaiTranslation: เชื่อมโยงกัน, เป็นเหตุเป็นผล
words.definition: Logical and consistent.
